override_synopsis: Bulk-create users in a tenant via CSV import

add_params.name: BulkUser
add_params.description: Array of user objects to create. Each element is a user row (typically from CSV import).

add_params.name: licenses
add_params.description: License SKU IDs to assign to all created users. Accepts array of GUID strings or LabelValue objects.

add_params.name: usageLocation
add_params.description: Usage location applied to all created users. Accepts LabelValue or raw ISO country code string.

notes: BulkUser is an array of user row objects. Each row supports: mailNickName (required), domain (required), displayName OR givenName+surname (one required), password (optional, auto-generated if omitted), businessPhones (optional), plus any additional Graph user properties via PSObject passthrough (open schema). label and value params removed — they are LabelValue unwrap artifacts from $UsageLocation.label and $AssignedLicenses.value access, not top-level body fields.
